name: Panacea Biotec Limited
summary: Panacea Biotec Limited, a biotechnology company, engages in the research, development, manufacture, and marketing of pharmaceuticals, vaccines, and biosimilar in India. The company operates through Vaccines, Formulations, and Real Estate segments. Its product portfolio includes prescription products in various therapeutic areas, including pain management, diabetes and cardiovascular management, oncology, renal disease management, osteoporosis management, anti-tubercular, and gastro-intestinal care; and vaccines for anthrax, dengue, Japanese encephalitis, and others. The company also engages in the real estate business. In addition, it exports its products to approximately 30 countries worldwide. The company has a collaboration agreement with Refana Inc. for the development, manufacturing, and distribution of the Covid-19 vaccine. Panacea Biotec Limited was founded in 1984 and is based in New Delhi, India.
